title: Oxford Puncture Fix Feather Edge Patch Kit
features: Contains: 1 x rubber solution, 1 x sand paper, 1 x chalk, 2 x patches 34 x 24mm, 4 x patches 25mm diameter, 1 x crayon
Ideal for those emergencies while on the trail
description: Product Description Puncture repair kit for those little emergencies while you're out and about. Comes with everything you need to patch up any small punctures and help to get you back on your way. A separate pump will be necessary to re-inflate flat tyres. Established in 1973, Oxford Essential Rider Equipment is one the UK's leading brand of motorcycle and cycling accessories and is going from strength to strength thanks to the recent surge in popularity in cycling both here in the UK and worldwide.
